entries.title: Catch up on what’s new
entries.description: Unseen production updates now appear in a changelog when you open the app, with long releases scrollable so every action remains accessible.

entries.title: Monitor catalog translations
entries.description: Authorized users can review Afrikaans translation health on a dedicated Translations page and retry stale or missing translations.

entries.title: Keep your language choice
entries.description: The site now remembers your preferred language as you browse and when you return.

entries.title: Browse a translated catalog
entries.description: Catalog content is now available in supported languages, with translations refreshed automatically when product information changes.

entries.title: Download localized brochures
entries.description: Product brochures now use your selected language, with improved title sizing for longer translated text.
